mappings.description: Queue depth range exercises QueueDepth signal
KV utilization range exercises KVUtilization signal
KV utilization value exercises KVUtilization signal
Cache hit rate exercises CacheHitRate signal
Prefix groups drive KV block reuse (shared prefix caching occupies KV cache), exercising KVUtilization

Arrival rate indirectly exercises InFlightRequests via queuing dynamics (Little's Law: L=λW); aggregate_rate is required in all inference-sim workloads, so this entry matches universally — not a direct signal parameter like in_flight_range
